_doc: Cells the coverage matrix should show as N/A (not_expected) instead of 'missing': partitions whose report genuinely does NOT disclose a given statement (verified against the PDF — never used to hide an extraction gap for data that IS printed). statement='*' = every NON-CORE lane this partition is missing (core BS/PL/cross always stay flagged). Entries are applied only when the cell is otherwise 'missing'.

not_disclosed.note: 14-page brief interim filing — none of the §4/footnote tables are disclosed
9-page brief consolidated filing — no §4/footnote tables (no capital/liquidity/etc. terms in the PDF)
